info.title: OpenFn Collections API
info.description: Synthesized OpenAPI spec for the OpenFn Collections adaptor (@openfn/language-collections). Collections are an OpenFn-internal, Lightning-hosted key/value store used as a high-performance cache, buffer or storage solution. A collection is a named namespace of key/value items; all values are stored as strings (which typically contain JSON). This spec is derived from the adaptor surface (get/set/remove/each) and the Lightning REST endpoints those operations call. Endpoints are mounted under the Lightning `/collections` base path and authenticated with a Personal Access Token (Bearer). An optional `project_id` query parameter scopes a collection to a specific Lightning project.

servers.description: OpenFn Lightning collections endpoint (matches WORKER_COLLECTIONS_URL / collections_endpoint).

host.description: Lightning host serving the collections API.

tags.name: items
tags.description: Read and write key/value items within a collection.

get.description: List the collections available on the Lightning instance (optionally scoped to a project). Synthesized management endpoint; the adaptor itself always targets a named collection.

get.summary: List / query items in a collection
get.description: Fetch multiple items from a collection using a key pattern (wildcards, e.g. `2024-01*`) and/or date filters. Results are cursor-paginated: if more items remain, a non-null `cursor` is returned to fetch the next page. This backs the adaptor's `get()` (multi mode) and `each()` streaming operations.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Key or key pattern to match. Supports `*` wildcards (e.g. `2024-01*`). Defaults to `*` (all items).

parameters.name: createdAfter
parameters.description: Only match items created after the end of the given ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: createdBefore
parameters.description: Only match items created before the start of the given ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return in this page.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from a previous response, used to resume paging.

200.description: A (possibly paginated) page of matching items.

post.description: Insert or replace one or more key/value items in a collection. If a key already exists, its value is overwritten. Backs the adaptor's `set()` operation, which uploads items in batches. Each item's `value` is a string (typically JSON-encoded).

delete.summary: Remove items by key pattern / query
delete.description: Remove multiple items matching a key pattern (wildcards) or date filters. Backs the adaptor's `remove()` operation in multi mode.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Key or key pattern to remove. Supports `*` wildcards. Defaults to `*` (all items).

parameters.name: createdAfter
parameters.description: Only remove items created after the end of the given ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: createdBefore
parameters.description: Only remove items created before the start of the given ISO 8601 date.

get.summary: Get a single item by key
get.description: Fetch a single item by its exact key. Backs the adaptor's `get()` operation in single mode. Returns 204 with an empty body if the key does not exist.

204.description: No item found for the given key.

put.summary: Set / replace a single item by key
put.description: Insert or replace the value for a single key. Synthesized convenience over the batch upsert endpoint; the adaptor's `set()` with a static key writes a single-item batch. The `value` is a string (typically JSON-encoded).

delete.summary: Remove a single item by key
delete.description: Remove a single item by its exact key. Backs the adaptor's `remove()` operation in single mode.

bearerAuth.description: OpenFn Personal Access Token (collections_token), sent as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

CollectionName.name: name
CollectionName.description: The name of the collection (a key/value namespace).

ItemKey.name: key
ItemKey.description: The exact key of a single item.

ProjectId.name: project_id
ProjectId.description: Optional Lightning project id to disambiguate a collection scoped to a project.

Collection.description: Metadata for a collection (a named key/value namespace).

projectId.description: Lightning project the collection belongs to, if scoped.

itemCount.description: Number of items currently stored in the collection.

CollectionItem.description: A single key/value item. The value is stored as a string and typically contains JSON.

value.description: The item value, stored as a string (usually JSON-encoded).

CollectionItemList.description: A cursor-paginated page of items. When `cursor` is non-null, more items remain and it should be passed back to fetch the next page.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor to the next page, or null when the last page has been returned.

count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

ItemValue.description: A single item value payload (for setting one key).

value.description: The value to store, as a string (usually JSON-encoded).

UpsertRequest.description: A batch of key/value items to upsert.

upserted.description: Number of items inserted or replaced.

errors.description: Any per-item errors reported by the server.
